authorizedTransfer(address,address,bytes.notice: Transfer from one address to another using an internal handle.         Used by pools to move tokens between internal addresses (pool → buyer, pool → seller).

pullFrom(address,bytes32).notice: Pull encrypted tokens from `from` into the caller (factory or pool).

transfer(address,bytes32).notice: Transfer using an internal euint64 handle (caller must be ACL-allowed on handle).
